title: Hand-rolled JSON scanner in extract_field is correct — do not replace with serde_json
description: SecretValue::extract_field uses a hand-rolled scanner instead of serde_json. This is correct: serde_json would deserialize all field values into a serde_json::Map, allocating String copies for every field value — including other secrets — in ordinary heap memory that is NOT zeroized on drop. A future contributor who suggests 'simplify this by using serde_json' would reintroduce unzeroized secret bytes on the heap. The hand-rolled approach is the minimum to uphold the SecretValue zeroization guarantee. The surrogate pair handling (RFC 8259 §7) is correct and necessary for full JSON compliance.
